SHORT NAME: MC_PLAN_WVR_ID 

LONG NAME: MC_PLAN_WVR_ID 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 20 

FILE(S): APL Operating Authority 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 

VALUES: Waiver ID, maximum 20 letters and numbers (e.g., W-1115/2016, MA.RO1.MO5, 1926544) 
Null/missing = unknown/missing 

COMMENT: The categories of demonstration and waiver programs include: 1915(b)(1); 1915(b)(2); 1915(b)(3), and 
1915(b)(4) managed care waivers; 1915(c)
